title: Create + Origins + Cobblemon
description: Modpack combines the Cobblemon, Create, Origins mods
body:
# **This modpack was created for comfortable play with the Create, Origins, Cobblemon mods.**
Mods have also been added for a more comfortable game!

(For this modpack, it is recommended to allocate at least 3.5 gigabytes of RAM to the game)
------------------------------------


```
list of mods -

Continuity
Origins
[EMF] Entity Model Features
No Resource Pack Warnings
BetterF3
Cloth Config API
Sodium
[ETF] Entity Texture Features
Reese's Sodium Options
AppleSkin

Starlight (Fabric)

Create
Dynamic FPS
Cobblemon
Entity Culling
Cobblemon Integrations
Memory Leak Fix
Indium
Fabric API

Ok Boomer
CobblemonExtras

Iris Shaders

Not Enough Recipe Book [NERB]
oωo (owo-lib)
Lithium
Create Crafts & Additions
Cobblemon - Loot Balls
Mod Menu
Cobblemon - Fight or Flight
Origins++
CIT Resewn
Create: Interiors
Presence Footsteps
Pehkui
Just Enough Items
Language Reload
FerriteCore
Motschen's Better Leaves
LambDynamicLights
3D Skin Layers
```
